arts.ttl: Birmingham City will be without five injured players against Wrexham
arts.sum: Blues will be without Ethan Laird and Luke Harris after the pair suffered ankle injuries in the win over Wigan Athletic before the international break. Giving an update on Laird and Harris, Davies said: “Ethan has a knock to his ankle, the same as Luke Harris, so they both look like they are going to be out for a little while now.

arts.ttl: Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney branded 'monsters' as Wrexham chief makes promise
arts.sum: Wrexham executive director Humphrey Ker has agreed to run a marathon after promising to do so when the idea was first suggested at a club AGM meeting earlier this year

arts.ttl: Ryan Reynolds' net worth compared to Tom Brady as Wrexham face Birmingham City
arts.sum: Wrexham and Birmingham may not be the first places that come to mind when you think of Hollywood, but a pair of celebrity icons will be watching on as their sides face off

arts.ttl: Ayumu Yokoyama reveals what ‘annoyed’ him after Birmingham City transfer
arts.sum: “I always ask Tomoki ‘what did they say?’ at a meeting when discussing tactics,” Yokoyama said in a sit-down interview with Blues TV. Ayumu Yokoyama has set his sights on the Premier League after an exciting start to his Birmingham City career.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City CEO Garry Cook explains Tom Wagner ambition and American takeover detail
arts.sum: Blues owners Knighthead have brought seven-time Super Bowl winner Tom Brady on board, while Wrexham are owned by Hollywood actors Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney. Garry Cook admits he isn’t surprised by the influx of American investment in EFL clubs ahead of Monday’s blockbuster clash between Birmingham City and Wrexham.

arts.ttl: I keep overlooking Birmingham City summer signing - Chris Davies won’t - Alex Dicken - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Many of us (myself included) are now presuming he sits on the bench for Blues in League One to accommodate the aforementioned Stansfield and May. And he probably will against Wrexham given the fact Davies has had an entire international break to create cohesion between the others. The notion that Davies could bench one of club-record signing Stansfield or League One goal machine – and four-goal top scorer – May hasn’t even entered my brain.

arts.ttl: Tom Brady issues brutal response after Eli Manning shows true colours in Wrexham rivalry
arts.sum: Wrexham have won their first three League One games of the season and are now being supported by ex-New York Giants quarterback and Tom Brady's old adversary Eli Manning

arts.ttl: Tom Brady responds to NFL rival Eli Manning over Wrexham support ahead of Birmingham clash
arts.sum: Eli Manning has pledged his support to Wrexham ahead of their League One clash with Birmingham City on Monday - and the Red Dragons have not wasted time in trolling Tom Brady

arts.ttl: Tom Brady and Ryan Reynolds' gigantic net worths as Birmingham host Wrexham
arts.sum: League One's super celebrity owners will pit their prized possessions against one another when Ryan Reynolds' Wrexham side visit Tom Brady's Birmingham City on Monday

arts.ttl: Preview: Birmingham City vs. Wrexham - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's League One clash between Birmingham City and Wrexham, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
